approval_steps: Confirm connector is registered and allowed for the workspace.
Confirm license notes are accepted for the intended use.
Confirm query and response metadata contain no disallowed PHI.
Confirm source release/version and fetched_at are recorded.
Confirm data steward approval before indexing content into retrieval.
rejection_handling: Keep rejection reason and hashes for audit.
Allow a new candidate when the source release, license, query, or redaction status changes.
warnings: Newly fetched documents are not searchable by default.
Approval for source ingestion is separate from approval for clinical or analytics export.
